elephants at the waterhole.] [We can do this by adding the number of elephants in each of the three herds.] [The first herd has 12 elephants.] [The second herd has 24 elephants.] [The third herd has 19 elephants.] [Adding these numbers together will give us the total.] [12 plus 24 equals 36.] [36 plus 19 equals 55.] [So, the total number of elephants at the waterhole is 55.] [This is a
